meaning: vt.以交叉线作出阴影,画出交叉阴影线
examples: Dark denim with a clean finish and subtle crosshatch texture.
The easiest way to check alignment is to display a white-on-black crosshatch pattern and inspect the individual bright lines.
The CrossHatch shader is a good example of how a surface shader can be used to pipe information from other nodes, including other material nodes, to a surface via its Shading Group.
